mapper.sql:
( SELECT pi.id AS sourceId, CASE pi.type WHEN 1 THEN 'LIKE' WHEN 2 THEN 'COMMENT' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS noticeType, pi.user_id AS fromUserId, u.username AS fromUsername, ai.real_name AS fromRealName, u.avatar AS fromAvatar, pi.post_id AS postId, LEFT(p.content, 80) AS postContent, pi.content AS commentContent, pi.created_at AS createdAt FROM post_interaction pi INNER JOIN post p ON p.id = pi.post_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = pi.user_id LEFT JOIN alumni_info ai ON ai.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND pi.status = 1 AND pi.type IN (1, 2) AND pi.user_id != #{userId} ) UNION ALL
( SELECT pi.id AS sourceId, 'COMMENT' AS noticeType, pi.user_id AS fromUserId, u.username AS fromUsername, ai.real_name AS fromRealName, u.avatar AS fromAvatar, pi.post_id AS postId, LEFT(p.content, 80) AS postContent, pi.content AS commentContent, pi.created_at AS createdAt FROM post_interaction pi INNER JOIN post_interaction parent ON parent.id = pi.parent_id INNER JOIN post p ON p.id = pi.post_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = pi.user_id LEFT JOIN alumni_info ai ON ai.user_id = u.id WHERE parent.user_id = #{userId} AND pi.status = 1 AND pi.type = 2 AND pi.user_id != #{userId} ) UNION ALL
( SELECT f.id AS sourceId, 'FOLLOW' AS noticeType, f.follower_id AS fromUserId, u.username AS fromUsername, ai.real_name AS fromRealName, u.avatar AS fromAvatar, NULL AS postId, NULL AS postContent, NULL AS commentContent, f.created_at AS createdAt FROM follow f INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = f.follower_id LEFT JOIN alumni_info ai ON ai.user_id = u.id WHERE f.followee_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 AND f.follower_id != #{userId} )
